stat_block.text: Orichalcum shields' time-bending properties are particularly useful for keeping them intact. The first time each day an orichalcum shield would be destroyed, it's instead left with 1 Hit Point and the broken condition.

traits.name: Rare
traits.text: This rarity indicates that a rules element is very difficult to find in the game world. A rare feat, spell, item or the like is available to players only if the GM decides to include it in the game, typically through discovery during play. Creatures with this trait are rare. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creatures is increased by 5.

variants.name: Orichalcum Buckler (High-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 14, HP 56, and BT 28.

variants.name: Orichalcum Shield (High-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 16, HP 64, and BT 32.
